zh.Westminster, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Richards於1576年3月21日出生在英國戴文肯恩時，他的父親Hughe Rychardes20歲，母親Dewnes Waltham28歲。他於1619年1月17日與Barbara Walter在英國戴文阿爾分頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1628年在英國享年52歲。

zh-hans.Westminster, London, England: 英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Richards于1576年3月21日出生在英国戴文肯恩时，他的父亲Hughe Rychardes20岁，母亲Dewnes Waltham28岁。他于1619年1月17日与Barbara Walter在英国戴文阿爾分頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1628年在英国享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Richards was born on 21 March 1576, in Kenn, Devon, England, his father, Hughe Rychardes, was 20 and his mother, Dewnes Waltham, was 28. He married Barbara Walter on 17 January 1619, in Alphington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1628, in England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Richards est né le 21 mars 1576, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hughe Rychardes, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Dewnes Waltham, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Walter le 17 janvier 1619, à Alphington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1628, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Richards am 21. März 1576 in Kenn, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughe Rychardes 20 und seine Mutter Dewnes Waltham 28. Er hat am 17. Januar 1619 in Alphington, Devon, England Barbara Walter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1628 im Alter von 52 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Richards è nato il il 21 marzo 1576 nel Kenn, Devon, England, il suo padre, Hughe Rychardes, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Dewnes Waltham, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Walter il 17 gennaio 1619, nel Alphington, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1628, nel England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Richardsが1576年3月21日にイギリスデボンケンで生まれた時，父Hughe Rychardesは20歳，母Dewnes Walthamは28歳であった。1619年1月17日にイギリスデボンアルフィントンでBarbara Walterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1628年にイギリスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Richards(이)가 1576년 3월 21일 영국 데폰 켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughe Rychardes(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Dewnes Waltham(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1619년 1월 17일 영국 데폰 알필그턴에서 Barbara Walter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1628년 영국에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Westminster, London, England: Westminster, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Richards nasceu em 21 de março de 1576, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hughe Rychardes, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Dewnes Waltham, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Walter em 17 de janeiro de 1619, em Alphington, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1628, em Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Richards родился 21 марта 1576 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hughe Rychardes было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Dewnes Waltham, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Walter 17 января 1619 г. в местности алфингтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1628 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Richards nació el 21 de marzo de 1576, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Hughe Rychardes, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Dewnes Waltham, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Barbara Walter el 17 de enero de 1619, en Alphington, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1628, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
